forum_source: only an exact immutable forum_user_mentions relation can describe or resolve a user-mention event
topic/reply publication and lifecycle visibility are rechecked while describing and resolving the candidate
self mentions resolve to an empty audience
user mention fan-out is bounded to one exact recipient
target-open authorization is rechecked before final notification creation
target routes remain UUID-based until FORUM-24
recipient_privacy: profile availability/privacy is evaluated before final notification creation
block in either direction suppresses the candidate
privacy provider failures retain retryability instead of allowing delivery
final_notification: preference policy is checked before privacy evaluation and rechecked in the final transaction
final notification identity is unique by tenant, recipient, source, source event and notification type
semantic replay must match source revision, target, actor, priority, template and template data
candidate completion and final notification persistence commit in one transaction
degraded_mode: Forum owner commands and mention event publication remain independent from Notifications
an unavailable source provider or privacy dependency is retryable rather than allow-all
the candidate worker remains disabled by default until operational evidence exists

deferred: bounded moderator audience expansion for forum.mention.audience_added
candidate worker default enablement after health and lag evidence
recipient privacy and source authorization recheck on inbox open
recipient privacy and source authorization recheck before delayed channel delivery
